title: Jana Nayagan
synopsis: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer into a battle far bigger than personal revenge.

synopsis_lang.en: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer into a battle far bigger than personal revenge.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 一場意識形態的衝突。一方代表人民，另一方則以控制為生。他們的道路曾在此前交匯過一次。多年後，一個孩子無聲的恐懼點燃了過往，將一名前警察捲入一場遠不止個人復仇的較量。

cast: Thalapathy Vijay, Bobby Deol, Pooja Hegde

cast_lang.en: Thalapathy Vijay, Bobby Deol, Pooja Hegde
cast_lang.zh_hk: Thalapathy Vijay, Bobby Deol, Pooja Hegde

subtitle: English
